white plastic cutting board with brown food residue and knife marks

atomic_facts.fact: A plated dish of seared scallops wrapped in bacon sits on a bed of creamy risotto.
A single scallop wrapped in bacon rests on a white cutting board in the background.
The cutting board is positioned behind the plate of food.

spatial: The white plate containing the food is in the foreground, resting on a white tiled countertop. The white cutting board is located behind the plate. A single scallop is sitting on the cutting board.
state_changes: Final plating complete: risotto topped with bacon-wrapped scallops.
